metadata.methodology: Probability-weighted resolution for ambiguous OHLC outcomes

hypothesis.primary: US30 exhibits predictable directional continuation after breaking ADR quarter levels, with Q1 breakouts showing the highest win rates and potential positive expectancy.
hypothesis.null: Quarter breakout levels have no predictive value; win rates do not exceed the 33.3% breakeven threshold required for a 2:1 R:R strategy.
hypothesis.result: NULL HYPOTHESIS NOT REJECTED — The base 2:1 R:R strategy with 1-quarter stops does not produce a positive edge on any breakout level. Q1 Up (24.3% WR) and Q1 Down (24.9% WR) are closest to viability but still 8-9 percentage points below the breakeven threshold.
hypothesis.key_insight: The 2:1 R:R structure with 1-quarter stops is too tight for US30 daily volatility. Price frequently hits both TP and SL within the same session, suggesting wider stops or different R:R ratios may be needed.
hypothesis.relative_findings: Q1 breakouts consistently outperform deeper breakouts. Long breakouts slightly outperform Short breakouts at Q1 level. These patterns suggest proximity to the open and directional momentum do provide marginal predictive value.

forecast.recommendation:
BASE STRATEGY: NO POSITIVE EDGE across all 8 breakout levels.
Best level: Q1_Down (24.9% WR vs 33.3% breakeven threshold).

UPCOMING WEEK LEVELS (ref open: 50434.65):
  ⚠ Q1_Up: 50,573.20 | SL: 50,434.65 | TP: 50,850.30 | WR: 24.3%
  ⚠ Q1_Down: 50,296.10 | SL: 50,434.65 | TP: 50,019.00 | WR: 24.9%

  ⚠ Q4_Up: 50,988.86 | SL: 50,850.31 | TP: 51,265.96 | WR: 22.2%
  ⚠ Q4_Down: 49,880.44 | SL: 50,018.99 | TP: 49,603.34 | WR: 13.4%

STRATEGY MODIFICATIONS TO EXPLORE:
  1. Widen stops to 1.5 quarters (reduce whipsaw stop-outs)
  2. Use trend filter: trade long after bullish prior close
  3. Reduce R:R to 1.5:1 (lower breakeven WR to ~40%)
  4. Focus on Q1 breakouts only (best relative performance)
  5. Add time-of-day filter: avoid first/last 30 min

Current ADR₅ = 554.21 pts | Quarter = 138.55 pts
forecast.risk_warning: The base strategy shows NO positive edge. Any trades based on these levels carry significant risk. Consider modifying the strategy with wider stops, trend filters, or different R:R ratios before committing real capital.
